title: Fit test - Disconnecting earbuds during Fit Test
scenario: Fit Test does not properly handle earbud disconnection during test on Poly Bluetooth earbuds
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with earbuds connected.
2. Navigate to App Settings → Onboarding / User Guides → Fit Test.
4. During the test, disconnect one earbud by placing it in the charging case (close the lid for applicable models).
6. Tap Retry to restart the Fit Test.
7. During the test, disconnect both earbuds by placing them in the charging case.
expected: Step 5: The disconnected earbud becomes greyed out with a yellow icon and "Fail" tag; the connected earbud shows proper icon and tag based on test results; text "The {right/left} earbud was disconnected during the fit test" is displayed.\nStep 8: Both earbuds are greyed out with yellow icon and "Fail" tag; text "The earbuds were disconnected during the fit test" is displayed.
